About

I am AmirHossein Movahedi. I was worn in March 31, 2002 in Isfahan (the half of world) The one of the large cities in Iran, I study physics at university. I took the bachlor dgree from Isfahan university of technology (rank 3th among the 60). For my journy of acadmic of life I be one of the five bachlor student that get the offer that go to Sharif university of technology to study the master, in master dgree I realy intersted in Complex system and The humman brain. Therefore, My master thises about the brain modelling.

I love play card because that I think, the advance theory of probability behind it. The time series is one of the my intested thing that I want to work on it.
